presets.label: hanuman flying over sea
presets.text:
Hanuman detonates across the void between one island and the next, hurling himself off solid ground with an explosive, earth-shaking surge, while the sea below convulses and heaves, its surface tearing into violent white spray and drifting salt-thick mist that stings the air with pressure and brine.

The mid-air passage stretches like a suspended illusion above the restless ocean, where wind shears around his form in roaring spirals, and the water beneath draws in heavy, living currents that surge forward and recoil in rhythmic, relentless violence.

He drives forward into the rushing air as if floating within it, while the other locks around the gadha, his body slicing through layered light and shifting shadow as sky and sea collapse into one roaring field of motion beneath him.

presets.label: mountain breaking
presets.text:
The camera drives forward in a slow, deliberate push toward the mountain’s कठोर face, where cold stone bears deep fracture lines, and the air tightens with a dry mineral bite as faint vibrations pulse through the ground. Hairline cracks creep across the rock like living veins, dust lifting in tight spirals as the wind sharpens and cuts through the valleys at a slanted force, pressing against the terrain while a low, heavy rumble builds from within.

A vast shadow sweeps across the mountain, swallowing light as the gada tears into the frame at immense speed, its descent ripping through dense air and forcing it aside with a deep, pressure-heavy roar that intensifies as it falls.

The moment of impact detonates with crushing force—the gada slams into the mountain and releases a violent shockwave that blasts outward, splitting stone, tearing massive slabs free, and hurling fragments into the air as a dense, choking dust cloud erupts upward, swallowing light while the ground convulses violently.

Cracks surge outward in all directions, racing across the mountain surface as entire sections collapse under their own weight, massive boulders breaking loose and crashing downward, colliding with explosive force that sends shards and debris scattering through the air.

The dust cloud expands like a heavy, breathing mass, rolling outward and veiling the shattered landscape while smaller rocks continue to fall in uneven rhythms, the ground’s violent trembling fading into deep residual pulses as the echo of impact travels across distant peaks and dissolves into a vast, weighted silence.

presets.label: shivaing running on nandi
presets.text: A vast aerial establishing shot opens over the Kailash stormscape as the Kailash range is engulfed in a violent high-altitude storm, where jagged snow-covered ridgelines cut through churning black cloud systems and lightning fractures the sky in rapid bursts, briefly revealing vast frozen cliffs, wind-carved cornices, and deep icy ravines, while Shiva appears seated upon a sacred colossal divine strictly white-colored muscular bull of mountain-like, enormous gigantic scale (vast beyond normal proportion, dominating the ridge like a living peak), with massively oversized horns and a clearly visible sacred red color teeka on its forehead identifying it as Nandi, which tears forward along a razor-thin snow ridge like a blade cutting frozen air; Shiva remains as a divine male tall deity, with a highly muscular, well-defined and powerful physique, broad chest, strong arms and pronounced huge musculature, carrying a serene yet commanding meditative presence — smooth ash-toned blue skin layered with visible sacred bhasm (raakh) smeared across the body in a natural, uneven and authentic manner (subtle dusty texture, not overly thick or chalky), slightly bluish Neelkanth throat, strictly super mature and intense face with sharper masculine features, deep calm eyes with a piercing steady gaze, faintly glowing third eye centered on the forehead, tripundra vibhuti markings, long matted hair in a high jata bun with flowing strands, adorned with strictly single crescent moon embedded within the jata bun (strictly not on forehead, no duplicates, not floating or separate), strictly four rudraksha malas around the neck fully intact and unbroken, strictly four rudraksha malas on each upper arm and four rudraksha bracelets on each wrist, strictly wearing a tiger-skin cloth wrapped firmly at the waist above the knees, and strictly holding a very long traditional trishul with an oversized three-pronged head in one hand as the bull’s colossal weight crushes the snow ridge, making it groan under pressure while wind shears violently across it and lightning silhouettes their advance; the camera tracks laterally at blistering speed in VFX / CGI particle-heavy cinematic fantasy style as snow erupts in dense crystalline sprays from each thunderous stride of the massive Nandi bull, which surges forward with unstoppable force; the bull then launches into a single explosive leap between two snow-laden peaks as storm wind stretches flying powder into a trailing arc beneath them and thunder detonates after lightning splits the sky; a low-angle dynamic shot rises as the colossal bull crashes onto a higher ridge, ice fracturing outward in sharp radial cracks, immediately driving forward through whipping snow while Shiva remains perfectly steady and commanding atop the motion as gale-force winds coil around them; finally an overhead sweeping shot reveals Shiva and the gigantic sacred Nandi bull traversing the vast glacial expanse of Kailash, bounding across frozen terrain where every impact sends tremors through the ice fields and lightning strobes intermittently carve the storm into fleeting white cuts over endless mountains and drifting blizzards.

presets.label: krishna river side
presets.text: A vibrant peacock feather spirals through the cool riverside wind in the extreme foreground, its delicate strands flexing and trembling as the camera glides inches beside its slow вращение-like drift, while blurred mountain ridges carve dark jagged silhouettes against the liquid gold-blue twilight shimmering across the restless river behind it. The camera begins a smooth circular orbit around the falling feather as soft gusts sweep flower petals and glowing particles through the air in layered currents, skimming low above the cold reflective water where faint ripples widen outward with quiet, glass-like tension beneath drifting bands of silver mist. As the rotation completes, Krishna gradually emerges from only side and back angles beside the riverbank, peacefully playing the flute strictly with his lips (flute should be very close to lips and not near chin) beneath the leaning tree while the wind threads through the hanging branches and flips clusters of leaves from deep green to pale silver in the fading light. The reflective water murmurs with slow-moving current beside Krishna, catching fractured streaks of amber and sapphire twilight that ripple and dissolve across its surface like living light beneath the breathing haze hovering above the shore. The camera slowly widens behind Krishna as the immense mountains loom in softened distance through layered twilight vapour, birds gliding silently across the vast sky while faint expanding ripples pulse through the mirror-like river under the cool drifting mist.

presets.label: nandi behind shiva
presets.text: A vast aerial sweep glides above jagged snow-capped mountains where razor-edged cliffs carve through oceans of slow-breathing cloud, descending toward Shiva meditating in padmasana upon a weathered stone at the mountain’s edge while freezing winds drag silver streams of snow across the abyss below. The camera circles Shiva in a measured orbit as layered veils of fog curl between fractured ice and black rock, snow particles spiralling sharply through the thin Himalayan air while the trishul emerges from the storm-lit haze, planted vertically into the frozen ground a short distance beyond Shiva’s unmoving hands. Nandi stands nearly two metres away in absolute stillness, massive against the endless white expanse, as violent gusts sweep low across the snowfield and scatter loose frost in sweeping arcs around both figures. A charged silence grips the mountainside; then a distant white fracture of lightning rips silently through towering storm clouds beyond the peaks, its cold flash glinting across the ice facets and ancient glacier scars surrounding Shiva and Nandi. The closing low-angle shot advances slowly from the radiant trishul, its pale light breathing through drifting mist and casting trembling reflections across the snow, toward Shiva and Nandi framed against the colossal Himalayan skyline while storm clouds churn like living shadows behind the mountains.
